queryList.1: hp_master: select id, module_activity_id, module_name, module_type, module_ethnicity, `status`, sort, sts, create_time, last_update_time, load_type, background, image_url_before_get, image_url_after_get, image_url_end, sort_rule, is_for_new_user, shop_link_type, shop_category_ids, shop_relation_type, filter_show_type, shop_show_type, market_tag_show_type, single_load_row_size, first_load_row_size, language_code,product_link_type,product_tag_ids,show_price_filter,price_threshold_min,price_threshold_max from module_activity_base where id = 2413 and sts = 1
queryList.2: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,receiving_max,country,is_add_insure,is_add_zego,is_tip_show,country,run_type,is_can_take_order,is_auto_receive_order,is_special_driver,calling_code ,salary_rule_type,contract_status,star,user_wx_openid,user_ali_open_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,register_source,user_email from user where user_id=1398716816 and role_id=0 and is_del=0
queryList.3: hp_master: select id, activity_id, module_id, user_id, module_red_packet_num, user_red_packet_num, create_time from module_red_packet_info where module_id = 2413 and user_id = 1398716816 and create_time <= 1748966399999 and create_time >= 0 order by create_time desc
